import cadquery as cq
w0=cq.Workplane('XY',origin=(0,0,1))
w1=cq.Workplane('ZX',origin=(0,-29,0))
r=w0.workplane(offset=6/2).cylinder(6,1.5).union(w0.workplane(offset=99/2).box(1.5,1,99)).union(w1.sketch().push([(0,0)]).circle(96.5).circle(84.5,mode='s').finalize().extrude(8)).union(w1.workplane(offset=9/2).box(1.5,1.5,1.5))
